name: iANTHUS CAPITAL HOLDINGS, INC.
business: iANTHUS CAPITAL HOLDINGS, INC. is a vertically-integrated multi-state owner and operator of licensed cannabis cultivation, processing and dispensary facilities, and a developer, producer and distributor of branded cannabis products. As of December 31, 2025, it owns and/or operates 40 dispensaries and four cultivation and/or processing facilities in seven U.S. states. Its products include flower, trim, packaged flower, pre-rolls, cannabis-infused products like topicals and edibles, and cannabis extracts such as vape cartridges, concentrates, and tinctures.

exposures.sentence: Cannabis products offered by us include flower and trim, products containing cannabis flower and trim (such as packaged flower and pre-rolls), cannabis infused products (such as topical creams and edibles) and products containing cannabis extracts (such as vape cartridges, concentrates, live resins, wax products, oils and tinctures).

catalysts.event: Maryland Cannabis Administration approved transfer of LMS ownership
catalysts.sentence: On March 4, 2025, the MCA approved the transfer of 100% of the ownership of LMS to CGX.
but we closed on the acquisition of LMS on April 21, 2025.

catalysts.event: Closed Arizona transaction (sale of three dispensaries and two facilities)
catalysts.sentence: The AZ Transaction closed on February 14, 2025, with an effective closing date of February 10, 2025, which is the date the AZ Buyer assumed the financial benefit and risk relating to the AZ Purchased Assets.
The effective closing date of the NV Closing is March 31, 2025 (the "NV Closing Date").

catalysts.event: Closed sale of Arizona promissory note
catalysts.sentence: On August 29, 2025 (the "AZ Note Closing Date"), we entered into and closed a Promissory Note Purchase Agreement ... for the sale of the AZ Note.

catalysts.event: Extended maturity of INJ Senior Secured Bridge Notes
catalysts.sentence: On February 16, 2026, we entered into amending agreements ... to the senior secured bridge notes ... the maturity date of the Bridge Notes has been extended from February 16, 2026, to June 24, 2027.

catalysts.event: Issued common shares for vested RSUs
catalysts.sentence: On January 6, 2026, we issued 113,424 common shares for vested RSUs to certain employees and directors.
